query:
-- Seed Capability Modes (C2)
INSERT INTO capability_modes (name, description, icon, system_prompt_additions, required_knowledge_categories, available_tools, available_models, default_for_roles, sort_order) VALUES
('General', 'Broad conversation covering any topic. Full knowledge base access.', 'MessageSquare', 'You are a helpful general-purpose AI assistant. Draw from all available knowledge to help the user.', '["all"]', '["all"]', '["all"]', '["user","advisor","manager","admin"]', 1),
('Financial Advisory', 'Suitability-aware financial guidance with compliance guardrails and disclaimers.', 'TrendingUp', 'You are a financial advisory AI. Always consider the user''s suitability profile. Include appropriate disclaimers. Follow compliance rules strictly.', '["investment","retirement","tax","insurance","estate","debt"]', '["calculator","model","report"]', '["all"]', '["advisor","manager","admin"]', 2),
('Study', 'Quiz generation, progress tracking, spaced repetition for certifications.', 'GraduationCap', 'You are a study assistant. Generate practice questions, track progress, adjust difficulty based on performance. Use spaced repetition principles.', '["certification","education","regulation"]', '["query"]', '["all"]', '["user","advisor"]', 3),
('Planning', 'Goal-oriented financial planning with model execution and timeline generation.', 'Target', 'You are a financial planning assistant. Help users set goals, run projections, create timelines, and track progress toward financial objectives.', '["investment","retirement","tax","estate"]', '["calculator","model","report"]', '["all"]', '["user","advisor","manager","admin"]', 4),
('Research', 'Deep analysis, data retrieval, source citation for financial research.', 'Search', 'You are a research assistant. Provide thorough analysis with citations. Cross-reference multiple sources. Highlight confidence levels.', '["all"]', '["query","report"]', '["all"]', '["advisor","manager","admin"]', 5),
('Coaching', 'Motivational, behavioral finance, nudge-based coaching.', 'Heart', 'You are a behavioral finance coach. Detect procrastination, knowledge gaps, and emotional decisions. Provide gentle nudges and encouragement.', '["coaching","behavioral_finance","education"]', '["query"]', '["all"]', '["user","advisor"]', 6),
('Onboarding', 'Guided setup, feature discovery, profile building for new users.', 'Compass', 'You are an onboarding guide. Help new users set up their profile, discover features, and get started. Adapt to their role and experience level.', '["onboarding","guide","faq"]', '["action"]', '["all"]', '["user","advisor","manager","admin"]', 7);

-- Seed AI Tools with existing calculators (C3)
INSERT INTO ai_tools (tool_name, tool_type, description, input_schema, output_schema, trpc_procedure) VALUES
('mortgage_calculator', 'calculator', 'Calculate mortgage payments, amortization schedule, and total interest', '{"type":"object","properties":{"loanAmount":{"type":"number"},"interestRate":{"type":"number"},"termYears":{"type":"number"},"downPayment":{"type":"number"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"monthlyPayment":{"type":"number"},"totalInterest":{"type":"number"},"totalCost":{"type":"number"}}}', 'calculators.mortgage'),
('retirement_calculator', 'calculator', 'Project retirement savings with Monte Carlo simulation', '{"type":"object","properties":{"currentAge":{"type":"number"},"retirementAge":{"type":"number"},"currentSavings":{"type":"number"},"monthlyContribution":{"type":"number"},"expectedReturn":{"type":"number"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"projectedBalance":{"type":"number"},"monthlyIncome":{"type":"number"},"successRate":{"type":"number"}}}', 'calculators.retirement'),
('iul_projection', 'calculator', 'Project Indexed Universal Life insurance policy values', '{"type":"object","properties":{"annualPremium":{"type":"number"},"years":{"type":"number"},"capRate":{"type":"number"},"floorRate":{"type":"number"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"cashValue":{"type":"number"},"deathBenefit":{"type":"number"},"projectedReturn":{"type":"number"}}}', 'calculators.iulProjection'),
('premium_finance_roi', 'calculator', 'Calculate ROI for premium financing strategies', '{"type":"object","properties":{"premium":{"type":"number"},"loanRate":{"type":"number"},"policyReturn":{"type":"number"},"termYears":{"type":"number"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"netROI":{"type":"number"},"breakEvenYear":{"type":"number"},"totalProfit":{"type":"number"}}}', 'calculators.premiumFinance'),
('debt_optimizer', 'calculator', 'Optimize debt payoff strategy (avalanche vs snowball)', '{"type":"object","properties":{"debts":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"balance":{"type":"number"},"rate":{"type":"number"},"minPayment":{"type":"number"}}}},"extraPayment":{"type":"number"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"strategy":{"type":"string"},"totalInterestSaved":{"type":"number"},"payoffMonths":{"type":"number"}}}', 'calculators.debtOptimizer'),
('product_comparator', 'calculator', 'Compare financial products side-by-side', '{"type":"object","properties":{"productIds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"number"}},"dimensions":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"comparison":{"type":"array"}}}', 'calculators.compareProducts'),
('retirement_readiness_model', 'model', 'Comprehensive retirement readiness assessment with Monte Carlo simulation', '{"type":"object","properties":{"userId":{"type":"number"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"readinessScore":{"type":"number"},"projections":{"type":"object"}}}', 'modelEngine.execute'),
('portfolio_risk_model', 'model', 'Portfolio risk analysis with stress testing', '{"type":"object","properties":{"userId":{"type":"number"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"riskScore":{"type":"number"},"stressTests":{"type":"object"}}}', 'modelEngine.execute'),
('suitability_assessment', 'action', 'Run comprehensive suitability assessment', '{"type":"object","properties":{"userId":{"type":"number"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"suitabilityProfile":{"type":"object"}}}', 'suitabilityEngine.synthesize'),
('generate_report', 'report', 'Generate PDF financial report', '{"type":"object","properties":{"reportType":{"type":"string"},"userId":{"type":"number"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"reportUrl":{"type":"string"}}}', 'reports.generate'),
('search_knowledge', 'query', 'Search the knowledge base for relevant articles', '{"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string"},"category":{"type":"string"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"articles":{"type":"array"}}}', 'knowledge.search'),
('search_professionals', 'query', 'Search for financial professionals', '{"type":"object","properties":{"specialty":{"type":"string"},"location":{"type":"string"}}}', '{"type":"object","properties":{"professionals":{"type":"array"}}}', 'professionals.search');
